scripts.dev: concurrently -n be,fe,sb -c blue,green,magenta "yarn workspace notedeck-backend dev" "yarn workspace notedeck-frontend dev" "yarn workspace notedeck-frontend storybook"
scripts.build: yarn workspace notedeck-backend build && yarn workspace notedeck-frontend build
scripts.setup: yarn install && cp -n backend/.env.example backend/.env; yarn db:ready && yarn workspace notedeck-backend prisma:push
